sections.paragraph:
i.q. מָסַס and מָאַס No. II., to melt, to flow down. (Chald. מְסָא, Syriac ܡܣܐܳ to be decayed, to putrify; Eth. መሰወ፡ to melt.)

Hiphil, to melt, to dissolve. Psa 6:7, בְּדִמְעָתִי עַרְשִׂי אַמְסֶה “I dissolve (as it were) my couch with tears.” Psa 147:18 fut. apoc. וַתֶּמֶס Psa 39:12 trop. to melt the heart, i.e. to terrify; plur. הִמְסִיו in the Chald. form for הִמְסוּ Jos 14:8.
